parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: '2.0', id: 0, method: 'initialize', params: { protocolVersion: '2025-03-26', capabilities: {}, clientInfo: { name: 'n8n-bkd-stage', version: '1.0' } } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: '2.0', id: 1, method: 'tools/call', params: { name: 'create-issue', arguments: { projectId: $json.projectId, title: $json.title, statusId: 'todo', useWorktree: $json.useWorktree, tags: $json.tags } } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: '2.0', id: 2, method: 'tools/call', params: { name: 'follow-up-issue', arguments: { projectId: $json.projectId, issueId: $json.issueId, prompt: $json.prompt } } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: '2.0', id: 3, method: 'tools/call', params: { name: 'execute-issue', arguments: { projectId: $node['Parse Issue ID'].json.projectId, issueId: $node['Parse Issue ID'].json.issueId, prompt: 'Begin execution. Follow the requirements sent in follow-up. When complete, move issue to review.', engineType: $node['Parse Issue ID'].json.engineType } } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: '2.0', id: 4, method: 'tools/call', params: { name: 'get-issue', arguments: { projectId: $node['Parse Issue ID'].json.projectId, issueId: $node['Parse Issue ID'].json.issueId } } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: '2.0', id: 5, method: 'tools/call', params: { name: 'cancel-issue', arguments: { projectId: $node['Parse Issue ID'].json.projectId, issueId: $node['Parse Issue ID'].json.issueId } } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: '2.0', id: 6, method: 'tools/call', params: { name: 'get-issue-logs', arguments: { projectId: $node['Parse Issue ID'].json.projectId, issueId: $node['Parse Issue ID'].json.issueId, lastTurn: true } } }) }}
